title: tessenia philadelphia
intro: Tessenia philadelphia, also known as Philadelphia fleabane or Philadelphia tansy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Tessenia philadelphia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antibacterial agent, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Tessenia philadelphia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
